title: Minevolution Evo-Reborn
description: The ultimate Mining Evolution Mini-Game... Reborn.
body:
# Minevolution Evo-Reborn

Based on "Minevolution - The Infinite Stone" by _TheVoid_

### What is MVER?

Minevolution Evo-Reborn is a third party update to the old map by __TheVoid__ which expands on the content while remaining with the original theme of the map.

This map is for all of those who can't find a good update, non-buggy recreation, and/or don't like the MC 1.9 overhauled betas. 

### Installation Instructions

1. Only works in **NEW WORLDS**.
2. Datapack form must be loaded on **WORLD CREATION**
3. Mod form must be loaded in a NEW INSTANCE/PROFILE. If you don't you could break one of your existing worlds, as just loading the pack/mod form ONCE in an existing world will damage it.
4. I recommend using a new Modrinth profile in the Modrinth Launcher.

### Why so Basic(as of alpha v0.1.0)

Yes, most of the core content of the map is still in development. Of the 4 content updates on my alpha roadmap, v0.1.0 was one of them and has released.

The second one(v0.2.0) is under heavy development, and will be worked on at the same time as some minor updates which will be v0.1.x

The third and fourth updates are not yet in development, but are in detailed planning stages.

After that, the map will enter beta, and yes, DOZENS of updates are planned before release.

### How do I Play?

Unlike the original version, this is now a datapack (& datapack based mod). You can either install like a mod, or you can create a world and insert the datapack. Be careful though, installing this as a mod will overwrite every world you open with the minigame, so don't try this on your survival worlds.

The other major improvement is the ability to seamlessly update this datapack/dp-based-mod as new versions come out. Updater systems have been built from the ground up, and many oversights fixed in v0.1.0!

### HAVE FUN!
